content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.83%, Bank Nifty -0.70%, VIX +7.9% to 18.17 — broad risk-off with sector divergence. IT, Pharma, FMCG, Healthcare are the defensive outperformers; Realty, PSU Bank, Energy, Auto under pressure. Held book is well-positioned in the defensive cohort and showing relative strength (COFORGE +7.8%, TATACONSUM +9.2% on watchlist, MARICO +1.8%, SUNPHARMA +2.2%, LAURUSLABS +5.3%). Priority is to trail SLs on winners and let losers respect their stops, not add to a 52% deployed book during a -0.8% tape with VIX rising.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "CMP 123.64 vs entry 125.10, P&L -1.2%. SL 121 well below CMP (gap ~2.1%, within noise tolerance). VIX rising could favor gold; thesis intact. No MODIFY — SL is at appropriate distance, no trail justified at -1.2% P&L."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L +3.3% at 847, broke out to new 52-week high on Q4 beat. Trail SL 832 → 836 (still ~1.3% below CMP, satisfies trail-gap discipline). Locking in +2% over entry on a winner with sector momentum + BULLISH research (+0.07 modifier). Target 870 unchanged — within R1 zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1358.97,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L +10% — best winner. SL already at 1358.97 (well above entry 1259, ~1.85% below CMP 1385). This is already a strong trail and within 1% floor. No change needed — current trail already locks in ~+8% gain. HOLD via no-op note: SL=1358.97, target=1500 unchanged. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.3%, CMP 2788. SL 2740 (-1.7% from CMP). BULLISH research +0.08 (Q4 PAT +46.7% FY26, refrigerant capex). Thesis intact, SL at appropriate distance, no trail justified at marginal P&L."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.3%, CMP 9050, SL 8950 (-1.1%). At 52-week high level. Research NEUTRAL +0.03 — margin compression flag, UltraTech competition overhang. Thesis intact at small loss; respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.5% at 10599. SL 10440 (-1.5% below CMP). BULLISH research +0.10 (buyback at 12000, dividend 150). Buyback floor effect supports downside. SL at appropriate distance; no panic-exit on intraday wobble (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 470.00,
      "new_target": 510.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.6%, CMP 478. Q4 BULLISH +0.10 (PAT +16%, FY27 guidance raised to low double-digit). Tightening SL 468 → 470 (still 1.7% below CMP, within floor). Marginal tighten on thesis-strong name with mild drawdown."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L +3.7% at 1270, at 52-week high. SL already at 1255 (entry 1226, locked-in +2.4%, ~1.2% below CMP). Already trailed appropriately; no further trail needed (would violate 1% gap floor). Maintain — emitting as HOLD effectively via unchanged values."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.2%, CMP 1257 vs entry 1248. Already strong Q4 beat priced in (+9% intraday). SL 1198 (-4.7% wide — sized for volatility on new ATH breakout). No trail at +0.2%; let position breathe. Pending OPEN BUY 20x @1240 should be CANCELLED — price has run to 1257, won't fill at 1240, dead order."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L flat at 865, BULLISH +0.12 (Q4 PAT +34%, orders +39%, ATH). SL 850 (-1.7% below CMP). Capital goods at record highs — defensive position holding well in weak tape. No trail at 0% P&L."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.2% at 8081. SL 7950 (-1.6%). Q4 board meeting May 20 — within 3-session binary window approaching. Position size ~5% of capital — within event-trade tolerance. Holding with SL discipline; will re-evaluate near May 18."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.1% at 1874, near 52-week high. BULLISH +0.07 (Organon deal, pharma sector at ATH, highest Nifty Pharma weight). Q4 results May 21 — outside 3-session window for now. SL 1830 (-2.4%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.2% at 1668. Research BEARISH -0.08 (Q4 PAT -15%, peer underperformance, P/E 54.8x). However stock surged +6.59% today on sector momentum. SL 1610 (-3.5% below CMP). Holding to SL — bearish research is a flag but the SL is sized to absorb noise; respect Rule 17 — no panic-exit pre-SL. Reduce confidence; if it weakens further on tomorrow's tape and bearish thesis materializes, will EXIT, but not on intraday wobble against intact technical bid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "NEUTRAL research -0.03. IT sector down 25% YTD; FY27 guidance midpoint only 2.5% CC. Sector recovery thesis intact but lacks catalyst urgency. Already have COFORGE (+10% winner) for IT exposure — no need to stack second IT name on a CAUTIOUS tape day."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "NEUTRAL research -0.04, near 52-week low. FY27 guidance 1-4% CC, lower bound stagnation. Falling-knife technicals — no confirmed reversal. COFORGE already covers IT exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "THERMAX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Not in deep-dive data this cycle — cannot evaluate properly without indicator/research detail. Skipping."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AFFLE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+12% with 2.4x volume but extended; no deep-dive research provided this cycle. Skipping on lack of analytical depth on a parabolic move."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+3.95% pharma momentum but no deep-dive data provided. Already have SUNPHARMA + LAURUSLABS + APOLLOHOSP for pharma/healthcare exposure (~21% of book) — adding fourth pharma name approaches cluster concentration."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+5.12% with 291% YoY Q4 profit, but no deep-dive data this cycle. Chasing +5% mover on day of broader -0.83% tape and rising VIX is poor R:R."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BIOCON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pharma exposure already sufficient via SUNPHARMA + LAURUSLABS + APOLLOHOSP. No new pharma slot needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "APTUS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+4% with 6.6x volume signal interesting but housing finance / NBFC cluster overlap with rate-sensitive financial theme; no deep-dive data. Skipping."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ASIANPAINT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+1.96% in weak market shows resilience but no deep-dive research. Marginal-quality entry on a risk-off tape day."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Index broken below 24000 with VIX +7.9% — not the setup for a tactical long-the-index ETF. Wait for support confirmation."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "VIX rising +7.9%, gold consolidation phase, SL 121 at appropriate distance from 123.64 CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 832 to 836 to lock in +2% on 52-week high breakout, sector momentum + BULLISH research."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1358.97 already locks in +7.9% gain at 1.85% trail gap — already well-managed, no further action needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2740 at appropriate distance, thesis intact, P&L marginal."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small loss, SL respecting position, NEUTRAL research with margin compression flag — let SL fire if hit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000 supports thesis; SL 10440 at 1.5% gap from CMP. No premature exit on intraday wobble."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 470.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL 468 → 470 on BULLISH Q4 print and FY27 guidance raise. Modest tighten preserves recovery option."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 already locks +2.4% over entry, at 1.2% below CMP — already well-trailed, further tighten would breach 1% floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "ATH breakout day, SL 1198 wide to absorb volatility. No trail at +0.2%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "BULLISH ATH name holding flat in weak tape — defensive strength. SL 850 at appropriate distance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 20 — outside 3-session window today, inside window from May 15 onwards. Will re-evaluate then."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, pharma sector at ATH, BULLISH Organon catalyst. SL 1830 at 2.4% gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish research is a yellow flag but stock up +6.6% today on sector momentum. Respect SL 1610 — no panic-exit pre-SL on intact technical bid. Will reassess if -3% from here."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Pending OPEN BUY 20x TATACONSUM CNC @1240 (placed 385m ago) should be CANCELLED — TATACONSUM ran to 1257 post-Q4 beat, won't fill at 1240, and I already hold 40 shares at avg 1248. Stale order. Pending OPEN BUY 600x HFCL MIS @133.50 (placed 5+ days ago) is clearly stale — should be CANCELLED as well. THERMAX, AFFLE, MCX, BIOCON, APTUS held on watchlist but no deep-dive data this cycle prevented action; will request next pulse.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day-22, book is 52% deployed with 13 CNC positions. Today's realized -₹28,429 is concerning but the unrealized +₹4,483 partially offsets and most of today's loss came from earlier session actions not shown. On a CAUTIOUS day with VIX +7.9%, the right move is management-side (trail winners MARICO/DABUR, hold the rest at SL) rather than admit-side. Cluster check: Pharma/Healthcare (SUNPHARMA, LAURUSLABS, APOLLOHOSP, LALPATHLAB) ~21% of capital — at cluster limit, no more pharma admits. FMCG (MARICO, DABUR, TATACONSUM) ~12% — within limits. Not opening new positions today; let existing setups play out. Rolling 5-day stats are weak (win rate 12%, profit factor 0.3x) — this is precisely when discipline matters most: don't force trades to recover, let winners trail and losers respect stops."
}
